Interface IUtilityNetworkCoreRule

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to utility network rules.

[Guid("9E69D91E-D28A-49B3-B989-D9522DB78D22")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IUtilityNetworkCoreRule

Properties

ValidRuleExists[esriUtilityNetworkRuleType, int, int, int, int, int, int, int, int, int, int, int, int]

Check whether the given network topology relationship is valid against rules.

bool ValidRuleExists[esriUtilityNetworkRuleType ruleType, int fromNetworkSourceID, int fromAssetGroup, int fromAssetType, int FromTerminalID, int toNetworkSourceID, int toAssetGroup, int toAssetType, int ToTerminalID, int viaNetworkSourceID, int viaAssetGroup, int viaAssetType, int viaTerminalID] { get; }
